## 🟦 TypeScript Logic Change

**Type of Change:**

- [ ] 🏗️ Refactor
- [ ] 📦 Dependency update
- [ ] 🔧 Utility/Helper addition
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix

**Summary:**

_Provide a high-level explanation of the logic or type changes._

**Quality Control:**

- [ ] Types compile without errors (`vite`).
- [ ] Unit tests pass.
- [ ] No `any` types introduced without justification.

**Related Issue:**

- Closes #
